subject: Re: Image re-centering feature?
body:
Ah yes, this is annoying. I think there was actually a bug in 1.0.6 or 
1.0.5 that made the image jump unpredictably between zoom levels when using 
the mouse wheel -- it got fixed in 1.0.7 or 1.0.6. I'll include an 
additional limit that makes sure at least a small portion of the image is 
always within the field of view.

Cheers,
Dimitry


On Monday, November 11, 2019 at 12:00:01 PM UTC+1, Kotaro Tanaka wrote:
>
> Hi,
>
> I'm enjoying Warp so much, but I sometimes lose sight of a real space 
> image because it goes out of the Warp window while zooming in and out.
>
> I would appreciate if there is something like 'image re-centering' feature 
> to get back the images in.
>
> Thank you.
>
> Best regards,
> Kotaro
>
>
